plan_binding_snapshot.title: CP00-532 RP17.P05.M02.S15-RP17.P05.M04.S12 generated_from_weighted_implementation_ledger
plan_binding_snapshot.renumbering_policy: Pack IDs are monotonic after the latest live closeout pack. If a requested locked queue skips live-open ledger units, live-open units are inserted first and requested packs are shifted with correction_reason.

implementation_summary.summary: CP00-532 implements descriptor-only coverage of the RP17.P05 implementation workflow slice: the M02 Type And Shape Definition tail (the six remaining rows), the full M03 Primary Implementation Slice cycle (twenty-two rows), and the M04 Secondary Workflow Slice head (the first twelve rows) as three descriptor-only sections over 40 planned rows with Hermes evidence (H17), Claude review packet (C17), and CP00-533 handoff, without opening AI governance, model policy, retrieval scope, or citation runtime or any other closed runtime surface.

parsed_review.summary: CP00-532 (Risk B, 40 units, RP17.P05.M02.S15-RP17.P05.M04.S12) is a clean descriptor-only AI governance p05 implementation/workflow slice pack that passes independent read-only review with no findings. Verified internal consistency across registry.js (CP532 pack binding + no-write attestation with intact CP514->CP532 spread chain carrying promotes_claude_to_final_approval=false and claims_enterprise_trust_from_local_validation=false + requirements), service.js (freezeCp532Result, case set, descriptor), validators.js (coverage, slice validation, Hermes/Claude packets, handoff), contracts/ai-governance-core-contract.json (current_pack, cp532_requirements, cp532_no_write_attestation, and full p05_implementation_workflow_slice_descriptor projection, all deep-equal-validated by the validator script), test/model.test.js (3 CP532 tests covering coverage, descriptor-only rows, and authority boundaries), the closeout-pack-plan.json pack entry, the manifest, and the README #cp00-532 entry. Deliverable distribution {test:6,hermes_evidence:2,implementation:13,fixture:13,claude_review:2,security_audit:4} and micro-title distribution {Type And Shape Definition:6,Primary Implementation Slice:22,Secondary Workflow Slice:12} match the baseline, registry, manifest, and plan exactly and sum to 40. All 7 required public exports are present and re-exported via index.js. Boundaries hold: no real data (synthetic_only/no_real_data true), no writes (every no-write flag false; no fs/network/child_process/eval in package source), Claude restricted to read-only non-approver, and Hermes used only for deterministic descriptor projection (emits_hermes_runtime_receipt=false, receipt_shape descriptor-only no-write). The pack-level production_ready claim is correctly false (manifest runtime_ready=false, status implemented_pending_review); production_ready_candidate=true is legitimately gated on coverage+slice validity and does not overclaim enterprise trust or final approval. command-evidence.json records all 27 validation commands at exit_code 0, the H17 Hermes gate passed, and the readiness auth-preflight passed with valid JSON, non-zero stdout, and no auth failure (no forbidden review-evidence conditions present; no invalid attempts preserved). The two unrelated dirty files (scripts/progress-control-room-data.mjs, tools/progress-control-room/index.html) and other untracked workbook/LDIP files are correctly classified outside active pack scope. No P0/P1/P2/P3 issues identified; pack is ready for human-gated closeout.

commit_policy.message: Close CP00-532 ai governance core p05 implementation workflow slice descriptor pack
